audit_items.proof_trace: Both staleness and zero-price checks are correctly implemented as local responsibility: L162-164 reverts with StaleFeedData when `report.observationsTimestamp < block.timestamp - feedInfo.stalenessThreshold`, and L174-176 reverts with ZeroFeedData when `usdPrice == 0` (evaluated after decimal scaling). stalenessThreshold is enforced non-zero at configuration time (L244), so no bypass is possible.
